name: Touta Matsuda
description: __Height:__ 174 cm (5'8") Recognized as the most outspoken member of the investigation team, Matsuda possesses an enthusiastic yet impulsive and naïve personality, often lacking the seriousness required for his work. Compared to his colleagues in the task force, he stands out as notably inexperienced, often being perceived as the weakest link within the group. Despite his evident shortcomings and lack of experience, Matsuda proves to be valuable and, at times, indispensable to the investigation.

name: Yoshiki Tsujinaka
description: The best friend of [Hikaru](https://anilist.co/character/281110/Hikaru-Indou), he is a quiet teenage boy. He has a fondness for animals and insects. ~!The first to realize that "Hikaru" isn't Hikaru. He struggles with accepting the fact that his childhood friend has been replaced by something else, yet continues to go about his daily life with it.!~

name: Falco Grice
description: __Height__: 140 cm __Position__: Warrior Candidate Falco Grice is an Eldian Warrior candidate working for the Marley government and is the younger brother of [Colt Grice](https://anilist.co/character/125665/Colt-Grice). Falco is close friends with his fellow warrior candidates; [Udo](https://anilist.co/character/125663/Udo), [Zofia](https://anilist.co/character/125664/Zofia), and [Gabi](https://anilist.co/character/125659/Gabi-Braun). name: En
description: __Height:__ 183 cm (6'0") Boss of the En family and is an elite Magic User. He is cousins with Noi and Kikurage's partner. He's also good friends with Chidaruma, who is the most powerful Devil. En controls most of if not all business within the Magic-User realm and is regarded as one of the strongest Magic Users in the world. He's shown to be a man who has a large expansive group of lackeys, and is currently Noi and Shin's boss. Typically seen in loosely worn formal attire and wears his long, re

name: Hana Midorikawa
description: Hana is the secretary of the Underground Student Council, a vigilante school organisation. Hana is the fourth-best karate champion in the inter-high school championships. She is a subordinate and loyal friend of Mari Kurihara, the president of the USC. Hana is of average height and slim with a medium bust. She has straw-coloured hair in a bob, and brown eyes. She is athletic and somewhat muscular despite her weight, as a third-grade Dan and the school's fourth best karate champion. She wears the

name: Sasha Necron
description: A member of the House of Necron and direct descendant of Ivis Necron. Sasha Necron is called the, "Witch of Destruction," by others. She has the Demon Eyes of Destruction, which allow her to destroy anything she chooses within her field of view. Sasha is the older sister of Misha Necron. Sasha has a cold personality towards her sister, calling her a, "defective doll." Towards others, she acts superior and above them, due to her status. name: Kyouko Toshinou
description: Toshinou Kyouko is the founder of the amusement club. Goes so wild that no one can keep up with her, but it's not as if anyone even tries in the first place, so it's ultimately no big deal. She is actually an otaku who creates her own doujinshi of Mirakurun, an anime character in Yuru Yuri. Her favorite ice cream is rum raisin.

name: Klein Moretti
description: __Height:__ 172 cm (Debut); 180 cm (Chapter 1268) Klein Moretti is the main protagonist of Lord of Mysteries. "He" is a Beyonder. "He" is the mysterious leader of the Tarot Club known as The Fool and a Transmigrator who comes from the modern era. Klein Moretti has exhibited a cautious and good-natured personality. name: Yui
description: A young and cheerful girl with long black hair who looks no older than 10 years old. name: Hikaru Indou
description: An easy going teenage boy who went missing in the forbidden mountains for a week about half a year ago. ~!A shapeshifter who took the form of Hikaru after his death. This new "Hikaru" has become greatly attached to Hikaru's best friend Yoshiki. It seems innocent and full of curiosity.!~

name: Jinzouningen 18-gou
description: Android 18 is a fictional character who first appears in the Dragon Ball manga created by Akira Toriyama, followed by Dragon Ball Z and Dragon Ball GT. No. 18 is a mass murderer in Future Trunks' timeline. A cybernetic human, #18 modified by [Dr. Gero](https://anilist.co/character/2146). She is often referred to in the original Japanese as a jinzōningen, which literally translates as "artificial human". She is not entirely an android; she refers to both herself and her twin brother as having bee

name: Rin Nanakura
description: Rin Nanakura is the main protagonist of Pseudo Harem. She is a part of Kouban High's drama club and uses her acting skills to tease her fellow club member, [Eiji Kitahama](https://anilist.co/character/140040), with various personas in hopes of making him fall for her. She has a friendly personality, although she is somewhat shy about her feelings for her crush, leading her to adopt a pseudo-personality for his enjoyment. She can also make others laugh and enjoy laughing herself. Rin is a highly

name: Tokushirou Tsurumi
description: __Likes:__ Japanese sweets (Wagashi) __Dislikes:__ Alcohol Leader of the 7th Division and one of the antagonists of the series. Tsurumi has an unpredictable, mildly histrionic and erratic behaviour. However, In the past, Tsurumi was normal and was even a brave Japanese officer who fought at the front during the Russo-Japanese war. name: X
description: __Height:__ 180 cm A man in a suit who claimed the title of X in the blink of an eye. His lack of affiliation to any organization makes him all the more enigmatic. (Source: Official Site)

name: Yoshikazu Miyano
description: __Height:__ 160 cm He's really sensitive about his girlish features, and he's a hardcore fudanshi.

name: Jiji
description: Jiji is Kiki's sharp-tongued, sarcastic, and sometimes humorously pessimistic feline companion. He is constantly offering well-intended advice (and admonishments) that might make him seem overcritical of Kiki. But he is really a big softie, and his humorous commentary on the events of the movie are hilarious... in a way only a talking cat can be.

name: Roberta Cisneros
nativeName: ロベルタ・チスネロス
description: Roberta is a maid who worked for four years at the Lovelace household in Venezuela. Although her domestic skills, such as cleaning and cooking, were poor, she has developed a close friendship with the young scion of the Lovelace family, Garcia. ~!Roberta was once known as Rosarita Cisneros, a former FARC guerrilla trained as an assassin in Cuba and an internationally wanted criminal. name: Wakana Sakai
description: __Height__: 160 cm Wakana is known for being somewhat of a loner, and that is due to her outward personality that may seem harsh to others. She is skilled at playing the piano and has [a cat](https://anilist.co/character/386264) as a pet. Despite the fact that she is very good at singing, she refuses to do so to the point of turning down Konatsu's attempt to recruit her into her new choir club.
